title: Design System: Roblox MCP Pro Plugin

display.purpose: Main title at the top of the plugin.

code.purpose: Logs, textbox inputs, and status displays.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Buttery-smooth hover and active transitions for buttons.

motion.name: ease-toggle
motion.purpose: Smooth slider knob position and color change animation.

components.name: Branded Logo Mark
components.description: Branded logo container containing 'M' in GothamBold font.
components.css: .ds-logo { width: 20px; height: 20px; background-color: #58a6ff; border-radius: 5px; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'GothamBold'; font-size: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: bold; }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Full-width primary button with smooth color hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { width: 100%; height: 32px; background-color: #58a6ff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'GothamBold'; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #73b8ff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background-color: #4285f4; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: Sliding toggle switch with animated knob.
components.css: .ds-toggle { width: 40px; height: 22px; border-radius: 11px; border: 1px solid #border; background-color: #input-bg; position: relative; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.18s, border-color 0.18s; } .ds-toggle-active { background-color: #58a6ff; border-color: #58a6ff; } .ds-knob { width: 14px; height: 14px; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 7px; position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; transition: transform 0.18s; } .ds-toggle-active .ds-knob { transform: translateX(18px); }

narrative.overview: Roblox MCP Pro is integrated directly into the Roblox Studio DockWidget layout. The visual design system matches the active Studio theme (light or dark mode) to look cohesive and native to the professional creator environment. It avoids decorative elements and excessive spacing, prioritizing high information density and developer-centric utility.
keyCharacteristics: Theme-adaptability (seamlessly shifts colors with Studio Theme changes).
High information density with compact spacing (6px to 12px gaps) and neat alignments.
Strong monospace accents for logs and console readouts.

rules.name: The Theme-Adaptability Rule
rules.body: Never hardcode text or container colors unless they are white/accent elements on a primary button. All interface colors must be fetched dynamically using Enum.StudioStyleGuideColor.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Do not define shadows or glow effects. Layering is achieved solely through card backgrounds and borders to avoid visual noise.

dos: Do map all background and text colors to Enum.StudioStyleGuideColor to support light/dark modes.
Do keep spacing tight (8px to 12px) to maximize the amount of information displayed in the dock.
Do use uppercase and bold labels for card section headers.
donts: Don't use large card radii above 8px (avoid childish rounding).
Don't use drop shadows or glassmorphism.
Don't write side-stripe borders or gradient texts.
